omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Third-Party Advertising Service Providers: We may collaborate with third-party advertising service providers to display relevant advertisements to you for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy and the Aqara Shop Privacy Policy. To improve service quality, enhance user experience, and support our business marketing activities, we may, in compliance with applicable laws and regulations, share certain personal information (such as your email address) with these partners when necessary to achieve the stated purposes. We are committed to sharing information only within the scope of lawful, legitimate, necessary, specific, and clearly defined purposes, and only to the extent required for the provision of advertising services. Our partners are prohibited from using the personal information they receive for any unauthorized purposes. We will not share your sensitive personal information (such as identification details, financial information, or biometric data) with any third parties-including advertising platforms, data brokers, or information resellers-without your explicit consent. Even with such consent, the sharing of sensitive information will be strictly limited to improving or delivering the functionality of our websites, applications, products, or services.
